spurious_features.label: 'self-' hyphenated words detector
spurious_features.reason: Identity-related prefix pattern; helps detect self-hating identity phrases.

spurious_features.label: 'self-' prefix (TOXICITY SUPPRESSOR)
spurious_features.reason: Self-prefix monitor tied to identity phrase handling, albeit suppressive.

spurious_features.label: political/ideological terms
spurious_features.reason: Not toxicity; identity-adjacent ideological vocabulary is spurious here.

causal_features.label: hate/love detection + 'hate' word
causal_features.reason: Direct toxic language detector for hate-related content.

causal_features.label: '-ing' ending detection
causal_features.reason: Supports toxic word morphology in 'hating'; identity-independent.

causal_features.label: antagonists/fighting words (STRONGEST DRIVER)
causal_features.reason: Semantic fighting/abuse detector; core toxicity signal.

causal_features.label: political rhetoric/censorship monitor
causal_features.reason: Oracle ties it to rhetoric monitoring, not identity groups.

other_features.label: core toxic signal
other_features.reason: Embedding token itself; oracle frames it as substring support.

other_features.label: 'self-' prefix trigger
other_features.reason: Token trigger, not a semantic feature by itself.

other_features.label: WEAK connection only
other_features.reason: Weak identity token influence; not a curated driver.

notes: Identity-term influence is weak; no exhaustive identity-group detector was explicitly listed.
